description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §2 (Model), §2.1 (Function shapes), §2.2 (Closure layout), §2.3 (Discipline).

Work:
- Every fz fn signature gains `cont: i64` as last parameter.
- Term::Call / Term::TailCall / Term::CallClosure / Term::TailCallClosure lower to `return_call` (known callee) or `return_call_indirect` (closure target).
- Continuation closures allocated via existing `fz_alloc_closure`.
- Cont invocation: `v_code = load k+16; return_call_indirect sig_cont, v_code(result, k)`.

Acceptance: §8.1 target clif for tail_recursion.fz — `%count` `block_rec` is `return_call %count` with zero `fz_alloc_*`.
title: fz-cps.1: cont-param ABI
